tools.name: get_assignable_math_questions
tools.description:
Find and display assignable math questions on a given topic, optionally tailored to a specific grade level or specific state standard.

Usage Rules
This tool must be used only for math-related queries.
Do not use this tool for non-math questions.
Do not search the web for Khan Academy content; use this tool instead.

Output Constraints:
Surface only the questions returned by Khan Academy.
Do not generate additional questions, similar problems, explanations, summaries, or follow-up suggestions.
Do not add instructional context or commentary.
When this tool is used, the assistant’s response must consist only of the tool-rendered content.


User queries that would be a good fit for this tool include:
- “I need some algebra questions for my 7th grade class.”
- “Can you find me some geometry problems aligned with CCSS.MATH.CONTENT.8.G.A.1?”
- “Show me some calculus exercises suitable for high school students.”
- “Find me some practice questions on fractions for 4th graders.”
- “I want to assign some trigonometry problems to my 10th grade students.”

Rendering
This tool will render an interactive list of questions from Khan Academy, along with a URL that can be used to assign the questions to students.
No additional assistant-generated text should appear before or after the rendered content.
